subject: Account Review — Action Required
body_paragraphs: I am reaching out to flag some concerns that have surfaced in our recent customer interactions. The partnership is showing signs of strain that require our immediate attention and a coordinated response.

The primary points of concern center on unmet expectations and a shift in how the customer perceives the value we are delivering. While technical metrics remain strong, the relationship health tells a different story.
I would recommend we schedule an executive review to assess the situation and develop a clear action plan before the renewal window approaches.
